verdict: TRANSVERSE-DOMINANT: the soft (massless) modes are the two transverse-to-<n> Goldstones; the longitudinal amplitude is stiff. Their COUNT (2) matches the photon's two polarisations. CAVEAT: this is internal-space transversality; full gauge-transversality to k (k.A=0) needs an internal<->spacetime index identification not supplied by the bare sigma model.
